Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Back Blings / Back Blings

Back Blings

Overview

As of May 26th 2026, there are around 2,475[1] Back Blings In-Game
“
Not functional, but they are trendy.
”
— In-Game Description

Back Blings are Cosmetic Items introduced in Season 3. They can be used in Battle Royale, Save the World, Creative and Festival.

Additional features available for Back Blings

Additional features available for Back Blings[]
Selectable Styles Reactive Animated Built-In
  • Clockworks was the first reactive Back Bling.
  • Dead Pixels was the first animated Back Bling.
  • The Child was the first built-in Back Bling.

Hero Back Blings

Hero Back Blings []

Main Article: Hero Back Blings

Hero Back Blings are Cosmetic Items only usable in Fortnite: Save the World and are locked to specific Heroes. Some Hero Back Blings are also present in other modes such as Constructor Classic. Hero Back Blings are generally unlocked by evolving a Hero to tier 3.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Back Blings are also reffered to as Backpacks.
  • Several items in Fortnite: Battle Royale give the player, or replace the player's back bling, with a unique one only obtainable via the item. The following items give the player a unique back bling:

Jetpack

The Mandalorian's Jetpack

Stark Jetpack

Alien Jetpack

Hunter's Cloak

Eye Of The Storm Tracker

Inflate-A-Bull

Venom Symbiote

Carnage Symbiote

Cybertron Cannon

Mandalorian Jetpack
References

References[]

  1. ↑ Includes TBD and Unreleased Back Blings. Doesn't include Removed Back Blings.
